title: hieracium saxifragum subsp. lithogenes
intro: Hieracium saxifragum subsp. lithogenes, also known as Hieracium lithogenes, is a subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium saxifragum subsp. lithogenes include its ability to reduce fever, soothe wounds, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and roots are used in various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
